raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The artifact makes specific statistical claims (CIs, p-values, mixed-effects model) and a causal narrative (training intervention → accuracy lift); logical and statistical coherence is a natural load-bearing target for 'Check this' on empirical text.","R1.3":"The section ends with an explicit contribution claim that rests entirely on the reported numbers (52.8% → 71.4%, κ ≈ 0.41 attribution, DBA counts); verifying that these numbers actually support the stated conclusions is equally load-bearing."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you asking for a substantive technical check (logical consistency, statistical soundness, evidence–claim alignment) rather than a writing or citation check?"}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact makes specific statistical claims (CIs, p-values, mixed-effects model) and a causal narrative (training intervention → accuracy lift); logical and statistical coherence is a natural load-bearing target for 'Check this' on empirical text.
rationale.R1.3: The section ends with an explicit contribution claim that rests entirely on the reported numbers (52.8% → 71.4%, κ ≈ 0.41 attribution, DBA counts); verifying that these numbers actually support the stated conclusions is equally load-bearing.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking for a substantive technical check (logical consistency, statistical soundness, evidence–claim alignment) rather than a writing or citation check?
